reviews.comment:
Limpio y ordenado. Buen desayuno. Falta mantenimiento. Excelente atención. Buenas vistas en las habitaciones del frente. Muy tranquilo.

(Translated by Google)
Clean and tidy. Good breakfast. Lacks maintenance. Excellent service. Good views from the front rooms. Very quiet.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3czdPdzdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar es cómodo pero muy caro (aunque la zona lo justifique). La moza Romina muy amable, muy atenta. La comida: irregular. Fideos con estofado, muy bien. Entraña y hamburguesa, bien.

(Translated by Google)
The place is comfortable but very expensive (although the area justifies it). The waitress Romina was very friendly and attentive. The food was uneven. The noodles with stew were very good. The flank steak and burger were good.
